summary: validate-resources SKILL.md aligned with v2 offers schema (offer_groups[].offers[]). Fixes false-negative 'offers missing' flag detected during Cherico live test.
notes: Pure doc pass on one SKILL.md. No code change. After install, re-run validate-resources on any brand that previously got a spurious offers-missing flag.

changes.note: § 11 Cross-Reference Validation: offers cross-ref updated from legacy offers.meta.product_slug to v2 offer_groups[].offers[].product_refs[]. Explicit code-block idiom for counting offers via offer_groups iteration. Line 319 wording tightened.
Prepend v2.6.15 entry with lesson on schema-migration drift.

post_steps: Re-run validate-resources on brands that were flagged 'offers missing' pre-v2.6.15 — false positives should clear.
